keyFactors: Belgium's recent form is slightly better than Egypt's, but both teams are in good form overall.
Belgium has a stronger goal-scoring average, but Egypt's defense has been more resilient with a higher clean sheet rate.
The venue is neutral, removing any home advantage.
Egypt's higher Elo rating suggests a marginally stronger team on paper, offsetting Belgium's robust attacking stats.
risks: Lack of head-to-head match history between the two teams introduces uncertainty.
Both teams' recent form is relatively high, suggesting a closely contested match.

prediction.rationale: Beide Modelle sind sich weitgehend einig. Ausschlaggebend: Egypt hat höheres Elo (1770 vs 1744) und bessere gewichtete Form (2.133 vs 1.908); Egypts Defensive ist herausragend: nur 0.414 Gegentore/Spiel und 57% Clean-Sheet-Rate; Belgiens Offensive ist stark (2.914 Tore/Spiel), aber defensiv anfälliger (1.054 Gegentore, nur 38% Clean Sheets).
